CLAUSE.NAME: Payment_DebitNote
CLAUSE.value: • Many thanks for your payment authorization. The collection has been settled according to your instruction and the original documents are enclosed to this letter. • We refer to our release of goods dd. ….. and are pleased to inform you that the expected documentary collection related thereto has been received. The relevant documents are enclosed to this letter and we settle this collection as per your previous instructions. • The above mentioned documentary collection is now due for payment and has been settled accordingly.
